summary: Iteration 187: SettingsPage Refactoring + AI Vision Drawing Analysis. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: SettingsPage shows all 11 tabs (Azienda, Banca, Logo, Condizioni, Integrazioni, Certificazioni, Migrazione, Backup, Notifiche, Team, Deploy), tab content loads correctly, company settings form fields present. RepositoryDocumentiSection has 'Disegno' upload option and 'Analizza Disegno' button logic is correctly implemented (button appears only for tipo='disegno' documents).

issues: Minor: React hydration warning about <span> inside <select> - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: SettingsPage.js: Successfully refactored from 1732 lines to ~185 lines by extracting 11 tab components
Settings tab components: All properly receive props (settings, updateField/setSettings) and render correctly
smistatore.py: analyze-drawing endpoint correctly handles both PDF and image files
smistatore.py: drawing-to-rdp endpoint properly validates doc existence and bulloneria data before creating RdP
RepositoryDocumentiSection.js: 'Analizza Disegno' button correctly appears only for tipo='disegno' documents with PDF/image content
RepositoryDocumentiSection.js: Drawing confirmation dialog has proper Checkbox selections and RdP creation flow
All new endpoints properly require authentication (401 without auth, 404 for invalid doc_id)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 187 tested SettingsPage refactoring and AI Vision drawing analysis. Key findings: (1) SettingsPage now has 11 separate tab components in /components/settings/, all rendering correctly. (2) New smistatore endpoints: POST /api/smistatore/analyze-drawing/{doc_id} and POST /api/smistatore/drawing-to-rdp/{doc_id} both require auth and return 404 for invalid doc_id. (3) RepositoryDocumentiSection shows 'Analizza Disegno' button only for documents with tipo='disegno'. (4) Drawing confirmation dialog has Checkbox selections for bulloneria items and RdP creation button. Note: No 'disegno' type documents exist in test commessa, so 'Analizza Disegno' button was not visible during testing, but code logic is correct.

SettingsPage.tabs_visible: ✓ All 11 tabs visible (Azienda, Banca, Logo, Condizioni, Integrazioni, Certificazioni, Migrazione, Backup, Notifiche, Team, Deploy)
SettingsPage.company_tab: ✓ Form fields: business_name, partita_iva, codice_fiscale, address, etc.

RepositoryDocumentiSection.upload_selector: ✓ Has 'Disegno' option in upload type dropdown
RepositoryDocumentiSection.analyze_disegno_button: ○ Not visible (no 'disegno' type documents in test commessa - expected behavior)
